description: A real-pipeline case where message-detail cannot resolve the sender: neither the notification frame nor the fetched detail carries sender_id. Under dmPolicy=open the SDK STILL delivers the message, and the normalized InboundMessage has NO senderId. This fixture pins the reality that senderId is OPTIONAL (P2): it must validate against inbound-message.schema even with senderId absent. Delivery/rejection behavior is unchanged — the owner separately decides whether to reject sender-less messages.
